properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I worship You, Almighty God, There is none like You; I worship You, O, Prince of Peace, That is what I want to do. I give You praise, For You are my righteousness. I worship You, Almighty God, There is none like You.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Jesus, we enthrone You, We proclaim You are King; Standing here in the midst of us, We raise You up with our praise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And as we worship, build a throne, And as we worship, build a throne, And as we worship, build a throne, Come, Lord Jesus and take Your place.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Shout to the Lord All the earth let us sing, Power and majesty praise to the King; Mountains bow down And the seas will roar, At the sound of Your name.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah Hallelujah to the Lamb. Hallelujah, hallelujah By the Blood of Christ we stand. Every tongue, every tribe, Every people, every land, Giving glory, giving honor, Giving praise unto the Lamb of God.
